response.overview: Pushing Boulder: A comedy doc that follows Mark Normand from NYC to Dallas for a weekend of 10 shows in an attempt to refine jokes and rework punchlines or as he says "turn every B into and A" for his Netflix taping in Boulder, CO two weeks later. We watch the green room hangs and the riffing process on the road all the way up to crafting a bit in-between tapings; Only to find himself back in NYC again back at zero.  Keep pushing that rock Mark.
response.title: Pushing Boulder: A Mark-umentary
